label: P&L Time Series
description: Stacked area chart of ten P&L factors over time with live and batch mode comparison.

0.6.note: isLoading skeleton added (header + chart area + footer skeletons).

0.7.note: timeSeriesData.length === 0 && backtestVsLive.length === 0 → 'No P&L time series data available'.

1.3.note: filterMultiplier reacts to selectedOrgIds — timeSeriesData re-derived on change.

1.7.note: PNL_FACTOR_CHART_COLORS from lib/config/services/pnl.config; FACTORS inline constant (not mocks).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to: live ✓ paper ✓ batch ✓. Time series renders historical data — meaningful in all modes. Backtest overlay is specifically useful in batch mode for comparison.

3.2.note: pnl-data-context.tsx: generateTimeSeriesData called with dataMode==='batch' flag (line 238). Batch flag adjusts data generation in context.

3.3.note: N/A — display-only chart widget. No order entry or submission controls.

3.4.note: Human to confirm batch mode visual indicator is visible when in batch mode (expected: batch badge in waterfall controls bar above this widget).

3.5.note: Paper mode: chart renders paper trade P&L time series. Expected behavior = identical rendering with paper trade data from context. No UI changes needed.

3.6.note: useWidgetChartHeight uses ResizeObserver (layout measurement only, not data polling). No WebSocket or setInterval. No connections to disable in batch mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks (3.1, 3.2, 3.3 N/A, 3.5, 3.6) pass. 3.4 needs human visual confirmation.

4.1.note: No dead buttons. Overlay toggle (Factor Lines / Backtest vs Live) and factor chip toggles all have meaningful handlers (setOverlay, toggleFactor).

4.3.note: Human to confirm factor chip UI and overlay toggle are discoverable.

4.4.note: Human to confirm overlay switch animates correctly, factor chips show/hide lines.

4.6.note: No inline entitlement checks in render path.

4.7.note: Human to confirm Factor Lines / Backtest overlay toggle switches chart view correctly.

4.8.note: Human to confirm chart does not overflow widget bounds at various heights.

l4.notes: Agent checks (4.1, 4.2, 4.5, 4.6) pass. Human walkthrough needed for 4.3, 4.4, 4.7, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all. Widget renders cumulative P&L factor lines for any strategies in global scope. Strategy-agnostic — FACTORS array is fixed (Funding, Carry, Basis, Delta, Gamma, Rebates, Slippage, Fees, Theta, Vega). Backtest overlay is relevant for all backtestable strategies.

7.1.note: BacktestVsLiveChart had #3b82f6 and #10b981 hardcoded. Fixed: replaced with var(--chart-1) and var(--pnl-positive). PNL_FACTOR_CHART_COLORS is in lib/config (read-only boundary) — not a widget violation.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks imports. PNL_FACTOR_CHART_COLORS from lib/config/services/pnl.config.

7.3.note: File 303 lines (≤500). Largest function BacktestVsLiveChart ~30 lines, FactorLinesChart ~66 lines, PnlTimeSeriesWidget ~70 lines. All within limits.

7.4.note: PascalCase components, useCamelCase hooks (useWidgetChartHeight), kebab-case file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, innerHTML.

7.7.note: useMemo/useCallback deps are stable. ResizeObserver cleanup in layoutEffect return. No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: All mechanical checks pass. 7.1 fixed (backtest/live line colors). 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: text-[11px], text-[10px] used for chip labels and footer text. fontSize props in Recharts tick objects (fontSize: 10/11/12) are Recharts API props, not tailwind classes — exempt. Tailwind arbitrary sizes deferred pending --text-2xs token.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing classes in this widget.

8.3.note: Uses Button from components/ui. Recharts primitives for charting (not substitutable). No custom div reimplementations of standard UI.

8.4.note: Agent: No without alt. No bare . Factor chips are

8.5.note: Human to verify at minW=4, minH=4 the chart renders correctly. useWidgetChartHeight ResizeObserver approach should handle dynamic sizing.

l8.notes: 8.2-8.3 pass. 8.1 deferred (micro-typography). 8.4 agent portion clean, human walk needed. 8.5 human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Separate widget gives users the ability to show/hide the time series independently from the waterfall. Different layout dimension requirements (defaultH=7 vs waterfall's 11).

relationships.notes: Peer to pnl-waterfall — both read from same PnLDataProvider context but neither drives the other's selection. Standalone chart widget.

dataContract.notes: Currently mock-generated in data context. Production: REST fetch on date-range/mode/scope change. Time-series data could be cached and reused across sessions for performance.

gaps: FACTORS array is hardcoded to 10 factors — dynamic factor discovery from backend not implemented
PNL_FACTOR_CHART_COLORS in lib/config uses hardcoded hex values — not theme-aware
coverage.notes: Widget renders any time-series data from context. Factor colors defined in lib/config are the primary styling concern for future theme work.

knownIssues: PNL_FACTOR_CHART_COLORS in lib/config/services/pnl.config.ts uses hardcoded hex colors — these are outside widget scope (lib/config is read-only boundary) but noted for future theme token work.

findings.description: pnl-time-series-widget.tsx:222-223 — BacktestVsLiveChart used hardcoded #3b82f6 (backtest line) and #10b981 (live line).
findings.fix: Replaced #3b82f6 with var(--chart-1) (blue/cyan token) and #10b981 with var(--pnl-positive) (green token). Both tokens exist in globals.css.

findings.description: pnl-time-series-widget.tsx — ~25 user-visible strings not wrapped in i18n helper.
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: pnl-time-series-widget.tsx — text-[11px] (chip labels), text-[10px] (footer text) arbitrary tailwind size classes.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (0.625rem/10px) using newly-added --text-micro token. Remaining text-[11px] (chip labels) has no matching token — retained as arbitrary class.
